title: Posh Paws Swizzels Love Hearts 18cm (7") Avocado – Let's Avo Cuddle Message Soft Toy
features: The perfect gift to give to family, friends and loved ones
description: Love hearts Alan the Avocado soft toy. Give someone an 'AVO cuddle' With this adorable Avocado love hearts soft toy. The perfect gift for friends and family that need a hug. Approximate 7" In size. Suitable from birth.
